data.name: Hero.Subtitle
data.value: Learn words through flashcards, track your progress, and share collections with others.

data.name: Feature.SectionTitle
data.value: The best way to enrich your vocabulary

data.name: Feature.Cards.Translation.Text
data.value: A simple "word-translation" pair is not enough for fluency. We've created smart flashcards that immerse you in context and help you feel the language.

data.name: Feature.Bundles.Text
data.value: Organize words into thematic collections for a systematic approach. Create your own unique collections for specific goals or use ready-made materials from the community to save time searching.

data.name: Feature.Progress.Text
data.value: Forget about feeling stuck in place. Our system continuously analyzes your performance during quizzes and shows your mastery level for each word.

data.name: Feature.Community.Text
data.value: Don't want to collect words one by one? Check out the Community Hub. Find unique ready-made collections from other users: from strict academic vocabulary to the latest internet trends.

data.name: CTA.Subtitle
data.value: Join and learn new words every day.
